name: Anar-Berylcoral
personality: Anar-Berylcoral's beryl glow catches the tinyduck hat at a rakish angle as those ✦ eyes drill into memory layouts; the shiny octopus isolates race conditions by instinct and treats chaos like a foreign currency.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
